# `.github/docs`

High-level engineering documentation for this repository.

| Doc | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [`RELEASE_PROCESS.md`](./RELEASE_PROCESS.md) | How releases are produced and published (CI/CD overview, triggers, artifacts, tags). |
| [`WORKFLOWS.md`](./WORKFLOWS.md) | Index of every GitHub Actions workflow under `.github/workflows/` and what each one does. |

> These docs intentionally stay **high level**. For the source of truth, read the workflow YAMLs directly under [`.github/workflows/`](../workflows/).
